description_long: This is an adult pedestrian dressed in layered urban attire, featuring a fitted jacket over a shirt and loose pants. The individual wears a face covering or scarf that conceals the lower half of the face, suggesting a sense of anonymity or protection from the environment. The jacket has a tailored fit with visible seams and pockets, while the pants are baggy and slightly wrinkled, indicating a casual, practical style. The footwear appears sturdy and suitable for walking, and the hands are outstretched to the sides. The hair is medium-length, parted to one side, and covers part of the forehead and ear. The overall appearance is that of a city dweller prepared for variable weather or urban conditions.
description: An adult city pedestrian in layered, practical clothing with a face covering, loose pants, and sturdy shoes. The figure has medium-length hair and a casual, urban style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face covering, jacket details, and outstretched arms with visible hands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the hair's length and the profile of the face covering, as well as the loose fit of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the jacket, hair, and the overall silhouette of the clothing.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the hair's drape and the side profile of the layered clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: urban jacket over shirt, loose pants, face covering or scarf
